Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A citation will be issued to the Conservator to appear and show cause as to why he/she should not be punished for contempt for failure to file the 10 account. The return date is November 19, 2008 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

Upon further review, the Court found that the accounting petition was filed and to be heard on December 31, 2008. This matter was taken off calendar.
